data.title: Mirakl will end the year with record growth
data.description: “It took us six years to reach $1 billion in GMV and another six to surpass $10 billion,” said Philippe Corrot, Mirakl CEO and co-founder. Mirakl experienced high GMV growth on Black Friday and Cyber Monday.

data.title: Ferguson faces challenges in Q1 but stays afloat
data.description: Digital commerce played a growing role in Ferguson's U.S. operations, contributing $515.8 million—7% of the total U.S. revenue of $7.369 billion.

data.title: Full Glass Wine makes new acquisitions, projects $200 million in 2025 sales
data.description: Full Glass Wine's latest acquisitions include Wine Access and Cameron Hughes Wine.

data.title: In time for the holidays, Amazon and Hyundai launch online car sales platform
data.description: Currently, Amazon Autos focuses on new Hyundai vehicles but plans to expand in 2024 to include additional automotive brands, leasing options, broader financing tools, and increased city coverage.

data.title: Investor group wants Macy's to consider selling real estate, and potentially Bloomingdale's
data.description: The push for Macy's to sell valuable real estate comes after the retailer rebuffed a takeover attempt in 2024.
